creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
the zip-package for that port is not on any master-site. If you
look at the primary master site http://www.alphaworks.ibm.com/formula/lotusxsl/

You find newer version that you can only reach over a license
agreement.

Fix: 

I think the makefile needs to be rewritten. First to use one of
the newer versions :-). And then to manually fetch the zip or tar.gz
file put it into /usr/ports/distfiles and then restart the make.
How-To-Repeat: try to fetch the port.
